title: Villager Caravan
description: Transport villagers with llamas by giving them the lead.
body:
Transport villagers with llamas by giving them the lead.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fOexlbQgJZc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Leads

Use a lead on a llama, then shift-right click on a villager.
The villager will then start riding the llama, and the lead will drop.

Lead one llama and the rest of the pack will all follow.
